pr.title: Write Vite HTTPS config wrapper to node_modules/.aspire instead of node_modules/.bin
pr.author: danegsta

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus / Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus (windows-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: The failing test is in Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus which is unrelated to the PR changes (JavaScript/Vite hosting). The error is a thread-safety race condition in Azure SDK's AzureEventSourceListener during DI client initialization.

failed_tests.name: Aspire.Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Tests.AspireServiceBusExtensionsTests.NamespaceWorksInConnectionStrings(useKeyed: False)
failed_tests.error: System.InvalidOperationException : Collection was modified; enumeration operation may not execute.
failed_tests.stack_trace:
at System.Collections.Generic.List`1.Enumerator.MoveNext()
   at Azure.Core.Diagnostics.AzureEventSourceListener..ctor(Action`1 log, EventLevel level)
   at Microsoft.Extensions.Azure.AzureEventSourceLogForwarder.Start()
   at Microsoft.Extensions.Azure.AzureClientFactory`2.CreateClient(String name)
failed_tests.reason: The failure is a thread-safety race condition in Azure SDK's AzureEventSourceListener (a List being modified during enumeration). This is unrelated to the PR which only modifies JavaScript/Vite hosting code. Only net10.0 failed while net8.0 and net9.0 passed, indicating intermittent timing issue.
